query:
SELECT 
  u.name as corretor,
  COUNT(*) as total_whatsapp_hoje,
  MIN(i.createdAt) as primeiro_whatsapp,
  MAX(i.createdAt) as ultimo_whatsapp
FROM interacoes i
INNER JOIN users u ON i.corretorId = u.id
WHERE i.tipo = 'whatsapp'
  AND DATE(i.createdAt) = '2026-02-13'
GROUP BY u.name
ORDER BY total_whatsapp_hoje DESC;
